elements: Primary CTA (Solid Navy) + Secondary CTA (Outline White)

features_section.layout: Sticky text on left, scrolling images on right (desktop)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white h-12 px-8 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline_white: border border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-primary h-12 px-8 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-300

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-hover
cards.feature: p-8 bg-background-subtle border-l-2 border-primary/10 hover:border-secondary transition-colors duration-300

navigation.desktop: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300 glass border-b border-border/10

forms.input: h-12 bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50
forms.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground mb-2 block

hero_slider.alt: Espace de bureau moderne avec cloisons vitrées

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}
motion.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: 'circOut' }}

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge embla-carousel-react react-hook-form zod @hookform/resolvers @radix-ui/react-accordion @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-label @radix-ui/react-slot @radix-ui/react-tabs
THEME: Force Light Mode as default. Use Dark Mode ONLY for the Footer or specific 'Cinema' presentation sections.
FONTS: Import 'Manrope' and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css.
NAVBAR: Create a transparent navbar that becomes white/glassy on scroll.
HERO: Implement a full-screen image slider with slow fade transitions (5s interval). Use gradients to ensure text readability.
FORMS: Use Shadcn Form + React Hook Form for the Multi-step Quote Wizard. Style it comfortably with large inputs.
STICKY CTA: Add a floating action button (phone/quote) on the bottom right for mobile, or a persistent sidebar tab for desktop.
VOCABULARY: STRICTLY use 'Aménagement', 'Espace', 'Transformation'. NEVER use 'Travaux' or 'Chantier' (unless referring to 'Chantier propre').
IMAGES: Use object-cover for all images. Ensure technical images (expertise) are crisp.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
